cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.

failures.message: R2SearchError: DuckDB execution failed: Parser Error: syntax error at or near ")"

action_plan: Fix the SQL-generation guardrail or schema contract named in the failure before rerunning the eval.
cases.next_action: Fix the SQL-generation guardrail or schema contract named in the failure before rerunning the eval.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH low_quality_residential AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search_with_sales_improvements.parquet') ps
  WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
    AND ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
    AND ps.primary_building_style IS NOT NULL
    AND ps.condition_codes IS NOT NULL
    AND lower(ps.condition_codes) LIKE '%msl%'
    AND ps.improvement_building_count > 0
)
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Area Parcels with Low Quality Residential Dwellings and 1-3 Acres
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate unincorporated vicinity, with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.

cases.prompt: lots in sedro-woolley or marblemount that are over 1 acre with utilities and no improvements.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number AS parcel_number, ps.acres, ps.city_name, ps.situs_city_state_zip, a."Utilities" AS utilities
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') a ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
WHERE (LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'marblemount' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%marblemount%')
  AND ps.acres > 1
  AND TRIM(COALESCE(a."Utilities", '')) <> ''
  AND (ps.improvement_building_count IS NULL OR ps.improvement_building_count = 0)
cases.title: Lots in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount Over 1 Acre with Utilities and No Improvements
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount, with acreage greater than 1, having utilities present, and no improvements recorded.

action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number AS parcel_number,
       ps.situs_address,
       ps.situs_city_state_zip,
       ps.owner_name,
       ps.land_use,
       ps.acres,
       ps.city_name
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND ps.acres > 0
  AND ps.has_geometry = TRUE
  AND ps.land_use IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    ps.land_use LIKE '%RECREATION%' OR
    ps.land_use LIKE '%OPEN SPACE%' OR
    ps.land_use LIKE '%PARK%' OR
    ps.land_use LIKE '%TRAIL%' OR
    ps.land_use LIKE '%NATURAL AREA%'
  )
  AND NOT (ps.land_use LIKE '%MOBILE HOME LEASED%')
  AND NOT (ps.land_use LIKE '%CONDOMINIUM%')
  AND ps.improvement_building_count = 0
ORDER BY ps.acres DESC
cases.title: Recreation Lots in Sedro-Woolley
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or situs city with land use codes indicating recreation or open space, excluding mobile home leased property, condominiums, public/civic/open-space parcels, zero-acre or no-geometry parcels, and parcels with residential dwelling evidence.
